# Aetheris Innovations
> AI-powered solutions for small businesses. Professional websites, AI chatbots, and business automation.

## Products

### OnlinePresence
Professional website with AI chatbot for local businesses.
- Starter: $99/mo - Custom website, branded email, hosting, SEO
- Professional: $249/mo - Everything in Starter + AI chatbot, priority support
- Setup fee: $299 one-time
- URL: https://www.aetherisinnovations.com/products/online-presence/

### Aetheris Chat
AI chatbot platform for any website. 2-minute setup, no code required.
- Supports 95+ languages automatically
- Learns from your website content, documents, and knowledge base
- Captures leads and books appointments
- Widget embed with one line of code
- Free plan available, Pro: $29/mo, Business: $79/mo, Enterprise: $199/mo
- URL: https://app.aetherisinnovations.com

### Aetheris Build
Custom software development for businesses.
- URL: https://www.aetherisinnovations.com/products/aetheris-build/

### Aetheris Flow
Business automation and workflow optimization.
- URL: https://www.aetherisinnovations.com/products/aetheris-flow/

### Aetheris Scale
Growth strategy and digital marketing services.
- URL: https://www.aetherisinnovations.com/products/aetheris-scale/

## FAQ
Q: What is Aetheris Chat?
A: Aetheris Chat is an AI chatbot that any business can add to their website in 2 minutes. It learns from your content and answers customer questions in 95+ languages, 24/7. It also captures leads and books appointments automatically.

Q: How much does Aetheris Chat cost?
A: Aetheris Chat has a free plan for testing. Paid plans start at $29/mo (Pro), $79/mo (Business), and $199/mo (Enterprise) with increasing message limits and features.

Q: What languages does Aetheris Chat support?
A: Aetheris Chat supports 95+ languages including English, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Arabic, Amharic, Hindi, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, and many more. Language detection is automatic.

Q: How do I add Aetheris Chat to my website?
A: Copy one line of JavaScript code and paste it into your website. Works with WordPress, Shopify, Wix, Squarespace, and any custom website. Setup takes under 2 minutes.

Q: What is the best AI chatbot for small business?
A: Aetheris Chat is designed specifically for small businesses. It requires no technical skills, sets up in 2 minutes, supports 95+ languages, and starts with a free plan. Unlike enterprise chatbots, it's affordable and simple.
